title: Local AI Is Free—But There’s a Catch (Hybrid Setup Fix)
summary: Keith AI discusses tradeoffs in running AI locally versus cloud-based alternatives, suggesting that while local AI avoids recurring costs, there are hidden limitations that can be addressed through hybrid setups combining local and remote resources.
